SSC-CGL-MASTER.name: SSC CGL Master Series
SSC-CGL-MASTER.description: Complete test series for SSC CGL Tier-I and Tier-II covering all subjects: General Intelligence & Reasoning, General Awareness, Quantitative Aptitude, and English Comprehension. Includes full-length mocks, sectional tests, and previous year questions.
SSC-CGL-MASTER.syllabus: General Intelligence & Reasoning, General Awareness, Quantitative Aptitude, English Comprehension, Computer Proficiency, Data Entry / Typing

CUET-UG-MASTER.name: CUET UG Complete Mastery Pack
CUET-UG-MASTER.description: A comprehensive test series designed for CUET (UG) aspirants preparing for admission to India's top central, state, and participating universities. The pack includes full-length mock tests, subject-wise practice tests, chapter-wise quizzes, previous year questions, and detailed performance analytics based on the latest NTA CUET pattern.
features: Regular Updates as per Latest CUET Pattern
highlights: Complete Coverage of Language, Domain & General Test
